headline: CrowdStrike, Other Cybersecurity Stocks Get Crushed. Why the Anthropic Bump Didn’t Last.
summary: Cybersecurity stocks were falling sharply on Thursday after the sector rebounded earlier in the week, boosted by a new Anthropic project.  Palo Alto Networks  was down 4.7%,  CrowdStrike Holdings  was off 6.6%,  Zscaler  tumbled 11%,  SailPoint  dropped 8.9%, and  Fortinet  slid 3.8%.  Aside from concerns that improving AI models can replace critical software functions, some investors are focused on how AI, and the implementation of AI agents, introduces more complex security challenges.

headline: Coro Appoints Lindsey Westbrook as VP of Marketing to Accelerate Channel Growth
summary: CHICAGO, April 09, 2026--Coro, the leading cybersecurity platform for Lean IT-driven organizations, today announced the appointment of Lindsey Westbrook as Vice President of Marketing, reinforcing its commitment to a channel-first go-to-market strategy as demand for partner-led security solutions continues to grow.
